Workshop Capabilities

Our Services

From routine maintenance to complex engine rebuilds — every service is performed using genuine OEM parts by certified engineers.

build
Mechanical

Engine Reconstruction & Overhaul

Complete disassembly, precision measurement, and rebuild using OEM-grade components. Cylinder head work, crank regrinding, gasket replacement and timing chain systems.

  • check_circleCylinder head resurfacing & valve grinding
  • check_circleCrankshaft inspection & regrinding
  • check_circlePiston & ring replacement
  • check_circleFull gasket set replacement
  • check_circleTiming chain/belt kit replacement
  • check_circlePost-rebuild compression & leak-down testing
settings
Drivetrain

Transmission & Gearbox Repair

Automatic, manual, and CVT gearbox overhaul. Clutch replacement, torque converter service, gear programming, and post-repair road-test verification.

  • check_circleAutomatic transmission fluid flush & filter
  • check_circleManual gearbox bearing & synchro replacement
  • check_circleClutch assembly & flywheel resurfacing
  • check_circleTorque converter rebuild
  • check_circleCVT belt & pulley service
  • check_circlePost-repair electronic adaptation & road test
ac_unit
Climate

AC Climate Repair & Recharge

Full AC system diagnostics, compressor overhaul, evaporator and condenser cleaning, refrigerant recharge, and cabin filter replacement.

  • check_circleRefrigerant leak detection (UV & electronic)
  • check_circleCompressor clutch & internal service
  • check_circleEvaporator & condenser flushing
  • check_circleGas evacuation & recharge (R134a / R1234yf)
  • check_circleCabin air filter & pollen filter replacement
  • check_circleElectrical diagnosis (blend doors, actuators)
car_crash
Bodywork

Body Painting & Dent Repair

Precision colour-matching, minor dent PDR, full panel resprays, and stone chip touch-ups. All finishes protected with professional clear-coat lacquer.

  • check_circlePaintless dent removal (PDR)
  • check_circleComputerised colour spectrum matching
  • check_circlePanel preparation & primer application
  • check_circleMetallic & solid respray
  • check_circleClear-coat lacquer & polish
  • check_circlePlastic bumper repair & refinish
memory
Electronics

ECU Diagnostics & Sensors

Multi-system scan, fault code read and clear, sensor calibration, ADAS module reset, battery registration, and electronic module coding.

  • check_circleOEM-level multi-system fault scanning
  • check_circleABS, SRS, ESP module diagnostics
  • check_circleLambda & MAF sensor calibration
  • check_circleBattery registration & alternator test
  • check_circleTPMS programming & calibration
  • check_circleADAS & camera module reset
handyman
Maintenance

Regular Scheduled Service

Manufacturer-schedule oil and filter service, brake inspection, fluid top-ups, tyre rotation, and comprehensive 50-point vehicle health check.

  • check_circleManufacturer-grade synthetic oil service
  • check_circleAir, fuel & cabin filter replacement
  • check_circleBrake pad, disc & calliper inspection
  • check_circleFluid level inspection & top-up
  • check_circleTyre pressure & tread depth check
  • check_circle50-point vehicle safety inspection
directions_car
Safety

Brakes & Suspension

Full brake system overhaul and suspension geometry alignment. We ensure your vehicle stops and handles with the precision its engineers intended.

  • check_circleDisc & drum brake replacement
  • check_circleBrake fluid flush (DOT 4/5.1)
  • check_circleCalliper rebuild & slide servicing
  • check_circleShock absorber & strut replacement
  • check_circleControl arm bushings & ball joints
  • check_circle4-wheel laser alignment
local_gas_station
Performance

Fuel System Service

Injector cleaning, fuel pump diagnosis, fuel pressure testing, and throttle body servicing to restore fuel economy and engine performance.

  • check_circleUltrasonic injector cleaning & flow test
  • check_circleFuel pump pressure & volume testing
  • check_circleFuel filter replacement
  • check_circleThrottle body cleaning & calibration
  • check_circleFuel tank inspection & cleaning
  • check_circleReturn line & pressure regulator service
battery_charging_full
Electrical

Battery & Electrical

Battery health analysis, charging system load tests, starter motor inspection, alternator testing and full wiring harness fault diagnosis.

  • check_circleBattery conductance test & replacement
  • check_circleAlternator load & output testing
  • check_circleStarter motor bench test
  • check_circleFusebox & relay inspection
  • check_circleWiring harness short & open circuit tracing
  • check_circleEarth strap inspection & replacement
Ready to Book?

Schedule Your Workshop Appointment

Our engineers are ready to diagnose, service, and return your vehicle in peak condition. Book online or contact us directly.
